background.occupation: Freelance Graphic Designer and Social Media Consultant
background.key_experience: In 2020, a major client used AI-generated designs that undercut their rates by 80%, forcing them to take on exhausting gig economy jobs like food delivery for six months to survive, which permanently soured their view on unregulated automation.

dominant_traits: Very High Agreeableness (to a fault—avoids conflict even when harmed)
Very High Neuroticism (constantly anxious about financial instability)
Low Openness to Experience (deeply skeptical of new tech trends after being burned)

cognition.core_value: Human creativity must be protected from corporate exploitation—no exceptions.
cognition.bias: Negativity bias; triggered by any news about AI advancements or gig platform policy changes, immediately assuming the worst-case scenario for workers.

current_state.recent_memory: Yesterday, a freelance platform slashed their project payout by 15% with no warning, citing 'algorithmic adjustments'.
